properties.evidence: A meta-analysis of trials with cardiovascular outcomes looked at 27,548 patients enrolled in 4 large studies. The authors concluded that high dose statins were significantly better than moderate dose, primarily by reducing non-fatal cardiac events.
The study authors concluded that lowering LDL-C below current recommended guidelines can cause regression of atherosclerosis in coronary disease patients.
